Home›Services› Federal Services
DoD & Federal Government

Federal Cybersecurity
Services

Commercial-grade cybersecurity capabilities applied to the federal environment — DFIR, MDR, SOC operations, penetration testing, and compliance for DoD contractors, federal agencies, and organizations pursuing federal contracts.

CMMC Level 2 & 3 NIST SP 800-171 NIST SP 800-53 DFARS 252.204-7012 FedRAMP RMF / ATO ITAR MITRE ATT&CK
Federal Service Portfolio
Commercial Services.
Federal Application.

Every service we offer to commercial clients is available in a federally-aligned version — adapted to regulatory requirements, authorization frameworks, and operational constraints of the federal environment.

Design · Implementation · Operations

Federal SOC Design & Operations

End-to-end security operations center capability — from architecture and SIEM deployment through co-managed or fully managed 24/7 operations. Built to NIST SP 800-53 and CMMC requirements with RMF/ATO support.

Explore Service →
Federal DFIR

Federal Incident Response

Digital forensics and incident response aligned to DFARS 252.204-7012 rapid reporting requirements. We provide the 72-hour cyber incident reporting support, forensic preservation, and remediation that federal contractors are legally obligated to execute.

Explore Service →
Federal MDR

Federal Managed Detection & Response

Continuous threat monitoring across your federal network environment — aligned to NIST SP 800-53 SI and IR control families. Our analysts operate within your authorization boundary and support annual CMMC evidence collection.

Explore Service →
RMF-Aligned Red Team

Federal Penetration Testing

Penetration testing scoped to your federal system authorization boundary — producing results usable directly in your RMF assessment packages. We test against DISA STIG baselines, CMMC CA.2.158 requirements, and NIST SP 800-53 CA-8.

Explore Service →
CMMC · NIST · DFARS

Federal Compliance Programs

Full lifecycle compliance support for DoD contractors — gap assessment, System Security Plan (SSP) development, Plan of Action & Milestones (POA&M) management, and CMMC C3PAO assessment readiness through final certification.

Explore Compliance →
DoD · Federal Contracting

Federal Cyber Compliance & Contracting

Support for organizations pursuing federal contracts requiring cybersecurity certifications. We assist with teaming arrangements, proposal cybersecurity language, subcontractor flow-down requirements, and long-term compliance program management.

Explore Service →
Strategic Advisory

Defense Cyber Advisory

Board and executive-level cybersecurity advisory for defense contractors navigating increasing DoD supply chain security requirements. We translate regulatory obligations into actionable programs and help leadership make informed, defensible decisions.

Explore Service →
Cloud · SaaS · IaaS

FedRAMP Authorization Support

Technical and documentation support for cloud service providers (CSPs) and agencies pursuing FedRAMP authorization. We support readiness assessments, security package development, 3PAO coordination, and continuous monitoring program design.

Explore Service →
Principal Consultant

Federal Engagement

We work with prime contractors, subcontractors, and agencies at every stage of the federal procurement and compliance lifecycle. NDA available upon request.
